summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a dual‑keyboard era concert, praised for its high‑quality audio.
review: The recording is described as good‑quality and likely sourced from the soundboard, delivering clear sound that showcases the unique dual‑keyboard setup of this period. Reviewers are enthusiastic about the show, calling it a great concert that captures the vibe of the era.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review highlights both an excellent performance and high recording quality, leading to a strong rating but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes good‑quality recording with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply enjoys the period and dual‑keyboard aspect.

band_member_comments.Keys: Positive mention of the dual‑keyboard performance.
